font-family.description: Font family for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-size.description: Font size for H3 elements — Carbon heading-03 (~20px).

font-weight.description: Font weight for H3 — Carbon weights up the smaller heading levels.

line-height.description: Line height for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

letter-spacing.description: Tracking for H3 — Carbon headings use neutral tracking.

measure.description: Maximum width for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

spacing-before.description: Amount of margin block start for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

spacing-after.description: Amount of margin block end for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

color.description: Color of H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-style.description: Font style for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

text-transform.description: Text transform for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.
